ige_cluster_insight: Five-domain four-property IGE cluster confirmed (C107). Domains: formal mathematics (DC#1), precision metrology (DC#2), geochemistry (DC#4), molecular biology (DC#5), analytical chemistry (DC#6). Each exhibits: (1) Near-zero TCI at measurement step, (2) BIPM-analog institution, (3) IGE-MCCF structure from physically orthogonal mechanisms, (4) Discrepancy visibility registry. Pattern is domain-general — confirmed across formal logic, quantum physics, nuclear chemistry, biochemistry, analytical chemistry. Sufficient to treat as empirical signature of IGE.
tms_analog_insight: TMS (tetramethylsilane) as universal chemical shift reference (IUPAC δ=0) is the clearest BIPM-analog template for DC#3. An agreed circuit-level reference computation — a 'TMS for AI circuits' — that all interpretability tools calibrate against would satisfy the BIPM-analog requirement for DC#3 full. Makes the DC#3 gap concrete.
